text: Healthy living is about taking care of both your body and mind. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and protein gives you energy for the day. Regular exercise, like walking or swimming, helps you stay strong and reduces stress. Don't forget sleep—seven to nine hours each night is essential for recovery and focus. Mental health matters too; take time to relax or talk to someone when you feel overwhelmed. Finally, aim for a good work-life balance by setting boundaries between work and personal time. Small daily habits can make a big difference in how you feel.
